description.value: Aura moderate conjuration and necromancy; CL 9th; Slot none; Price 4,000 gp; Weight 20 lbs. DESCRIPTION This large black leather bag has a wide mouth and laces to help keep it shut. It weighs 20 pounds and can carry up to 300 pounds or 10 cubic feet of material (easily able to hold a single Medium corpse or two Small corpses, including their gear). Anything within the bag is protected by a gentle repose spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, gentle repose, secret chest; Cost 2,000 gp
